meanings.definition: the act of depriving of food or subjecting to famine
examples: the besiegers used starvation to induce surrender
they were charged with the starvation of children in their care
The political prisoners starved to death
Many famished in the countryside during the drought

meanings.definition: have a craving, appetite, or great desire for
deprive of a necessity and cause suffering
examples: he is starving her of love
The engine was starved of fuel
